title: Spicy Fish Bowl
description: A flavorful and spicy Thai-inspired fish dish, perfect for a quick dinner.

ingredients.name: American bowl
ingredients.notes: Large enough to hold the fish and other ingredients

ingredients.name: Earthly
ingredients.notes: Sliced or chopped earthy ingredient of choice (e.g., mushrooms)

ingredients.name: Shattering
ingredients.notes: Sliced or chopped shattering ingredient of choice (e.g., peanuts)

ingredients.name: Fish sauce
ingredients.notes: Used to add a savory flavor to the dish

ingredients.name: Soy sauce
ingredients.notes: Used to add a rich flavor to the dish

ingredients.name: Honey
ingredients.notes: Used to add a touch of sweetness to the dish

ingredients.name: Rice vinegar
ingredients.notes: Used to add a tangy flavor to the dish

ingredients.name: Red pepper flakes
ingredients.notes: Used to add a spicy kick to the dish

instructions: Season the fish with salt and pepper.
Place the fish in the bowl and drizzle with fish sauce, soy sauce, honey, and rice vinegar.
Toss the earthy and shattering ingredients in a separate bowl.
Add the tossed ingredients to the bowl with the fish.
Sprinkle red pepper flakes over the top.
Bake in the oven for 12-15 minutes or until the fish is cooked through.
